metadata.name: fogopulse
metadata.description: FOGO Pulse - Prediction market on FOGO chain

instructions.name: admin_force_close_epoch
docs: Force-close a stuck epoch (admin only)
Emergency instruction to clear a stuck epoch when settlement
is not yet implemented. Sets epoch state to Refunded and
clears pool.active_epoch to allow new epoch creation.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin - must match GlobalConfig.admin

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - validates admin authority

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - must have this epoch as active

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch - the stuck epoch to force-close

instructions.name: admin_seed_liquidity
docs: Seed initial liquidity into a pool (admin only)
Transfers USDC from admin wallet to pool vault and splits
the amount 50/50 between YES and NO reserves. Used to bootstrap
pools with initial liquidity for testnet trading.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin - must match GlobalConfig.admin

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - validates admin authority

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool to receive liquidity

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC ATA - owned by pool PDA

accounts.name: admin_usdc
docs: Admin's USDC ATA - source of liquidity

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: advance_epoch
docs: Advance an epoch from Open to Frozen state
Permissionless instruction - anyone can call to advance an epoch that
has reached its freeze_time. This stops trading during the freeze window.
# Requirements
- Epoch must be in Open state
- Current time >= epoch.freeze_time
- Protocol and pool must not be frozen

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call - permissionless for crank bots/keepers

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - for freeze checks

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - must have this epoch as active

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch - must be in Open state

accounts.name: clock
docs: Clock sysvar for timestamp

instructions.name: buy_position
docs: Buy a position in an epoch
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless trading.

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().
This enables gasless trading when using FOGO Sessions.

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration
Used to check: paused, frozen, allow_hedging, fee parameters

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool being traded
Used to check: paused, frozen, reserves, active_epoch

accounts.name: epoch
docs: The epoch being traded in
Must be in Open state

accounts.name: position
docs: User's position account - derived from USER wallet, not session
Uses init_if_needed to handle both new and existing positions

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC ATA - must be owned by the actual user wallet
CRITICAL: When using FOGO Sessions, the session signer cannot authorize
token transfers from user's ATA. User must either:
1. Sign directly (not using session), OR
2. Pre-approve a delegate for their token account

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC ATA - owned by pool PDA
Receives net_amount + lp_fee (trading exposure + auto-compounding LP fee)

accounts.name: treasury_usdc
docs: Treasury USDC token account - receives 20% of fees
Must be ATA of config.treasury

accounts.name: insurance_usdc
docs: Insurance USDC token account - receives 10% of fees
Must be ATA of config.insurance

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: claim_payout
docs: Claim payout from a winning position
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless claims.

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().
This enables gasless claims when using FOGO Sessions.

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration - for freeze checks

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool - for freeze checks and token transfer authority
Note: Not marked `mut` as pool state is not modified by claim_payout

accounts.name: epoch
docs: The settled epoch - must be in Settled state

accounts.name: position
docs: User's position to claim - derived from USER wallet, not session
Must match outcome direction and not be already claimed

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC token account (source of payout)

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC token account (payout destination)

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: claim_refund
docs: Claim refund from a refunded epoch
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless claims.
Returns original stake when epoch outcome is Refunded (exact tie).

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().
This enables gasless claims when using FOGO Sessions.

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration - for freeze checks

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool - for freeze checks and token transfer authority
Note: Not marked `mut` as pool state is not modified by claim_refund

accounts.name: epoch
docs: The refunded epoch - must be in Refunded state

accounts.name: position
docs: User's position to refund - derived from USER wallet, not session
Boxed to prevent stack overflow with 11 accounts

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC token account (source of refund)

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC token account (refund destination)

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: create_epoch
docs: Create a new epoch for a pool with verified Pyth Lazer oracle data
# Arguments
* `pyth_message` - Signed Pyth Lazer message bytes (Ed25519 format)
* `ed25519_instruction_index` - Index of Ed25519 verify instruction in transaction (typically 0)
* `signature_index` - Index of signature within Ed25519 instruction (typically 0)
# Transaction Structure (client-side)
```text
Transaction:
[0] Ed25519 signature verification instruction (MUST be first)
[1] create_epoch instruction (contains pyth_message)

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call - permissionless for crank bots/keepers
NOT using session extraction: no user identity matters here

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - boxed to prevent stack overflow

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - must have no active epoch

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch account to be created

accounts.name: clock
docs: Clock sysvar for timestamp

accounts.name: instructions_sysvar
docs: Instructions sysvar for Ed25519 signature verification

accounts.name: pyth_program
docs: Pyth Lazer Program (FOGO-specific)

accounts.name: pyth_storage
docs: Pyth Storage account (contains registered signers)

accounts.name: pyth_treasury
docs: Pyth Treasury account (receives verification fees)

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority - must match GlobalConfig.admin
NOT using session extraction: admin operations require direct wallet signature

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig account - boxed to prevent stack overflow

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Asset mint this pool will track (e.g., BTC mint address)
Admin is trusted to pass valid SPL token mints. Invalid mints create unusable
pools but pose no security risk (they're simply useless).

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool account to be created

instructions.name: deposit_liquidity
docs: Deposit USDC into a pool to receive LP shares
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless deposits.
Deposits are split 50/50 between YES and NO reserves.
LP shares are minted proportionally to the pool's reserve value.

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration
Used to check: paused, frozen

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool receiving liquidity

accounts.name: lp_share

accounts.name: user_usdc

accounts.name: usdc_mint

instructions.name: sell_position
docs: Sell a position before epoch settlement
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless trading.

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().
This enables gasless trading when using FOGO Sessions.

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration
Used to check: paused, frozen, fee parameters

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool being traded
Used to check: paused, frozen, reserves; also PDA signer for transfers

accounts.name: epoch
docs: The epoch being traded in
Must be in Open state

accounts.name: position
docs: User's existing position - derived from USER wallet, not session
Must have shares to sell

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC ATA - receives net_payout

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC ATA - source of all transfers

accounts.name: treasury_usdc
docs: Treasury USDC token account - receives treasury_fee

accounts.name: insurance_usdc
docs: Insurance USDC token account - receives insurance_fee

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: settle_epoch
docs: Settle an epoch with verified Pyth Lazer oracle data
Permissionless instruction - anyone can call to settle an epoch that
has reached its end_time and is in Frozen state.
# Arguments
* `pyth_message` - Signed Pyth Lazer message bytes (Ed25519 format)
* `ed25519_instruction_index` - Index of Ed25519 verify instruction in transaction (typically 0)
* `signature_index` - Index of signature within Ed25519 instruction (typically 0)
# Transaction Structure (client-side)
```text
Transaction:
[0] Ed25519 signature verification instruction (MUST be first)
[1] settle_epoch instruction (contains pyth_message)
# Outcome Determination
- If settlement_price == start_price: Refunded (tie)
- If settlement_price > start_price: Up wins
- If settlement_price < start_price: Down wins
Note: Oracle data quality is gated by the BPS-based confidence threshold
check. If settlement confidence is too wide, the instruction rejects
(epoch stays in Settling state for crank retry).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call - permissionless for crank bots/keepers

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - for oracle thresholds and freeze checks
IMPORTANT: Use Box<> to prevent stack overflow

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - must have this epoch as active
IMPORTANT: Use Box<> to prevent stack overflow

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch - must be in Frozen state and past end_time

accounts.name: clock
docs: Clock sysvar for timestamp

accounts.name: instructions_sysvar
docs: Instructions sysvar for Ed25519 signature verification

accounts.name: pyth_program
docs: Pyth Lazer Program (FOGO-specific)

accounts.name: pyth_storage
docs: Pyth Storage account (contains registered signers)

accounts.name: pyth_treasury
docs: Pyth Treasury account (receives verification fees)

instructions.name: update_config
docs: Update protocol configuration (admin only)
Allows admin to modify GlobalConfig parameters like oracle thresholds,
fee settings, and feature flags. Only provided fields are updated.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin - must match GlobalConfig.admin

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - the account to update

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized - admin signature required

errors.name: AlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: GlobalConfig already initialized

errors.name: InvalidFeeShare
errors.msg: Invalid fee share - must sum to 10000 bps

errors.name: InvalidCap
errors.msg: Invalid cap value - must be between 0 and 10000 bps

errors.name: InvalidTradingFee
errors.msg: Invalid trading fee - must be between 0 and 1000 bps (10%)

errors.name: InvalidTimingParams
errors.msg: Invalid timing parameters - freeze window must be less than epoch duration, epoch must be at least 60 seconds

errors.name: InvalidOracleThreshold
errors.msg: Invalid oracle threshold - must be between 1 and 10000 bps

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is paused - no new operations allowed

errors.name: ProtocolFrozen
errors.msg: Protocol is frozen - emergency halt active

errors.name: PoolPaused
errors.msg: Pool is paused - no new epochs allowed

errors.name: PoolFrozen
errors.msg: Pool is frozen - emergency halt active

errors.name: EpochAlreadyActive
errors.msg: Cannot create epoch - active epoch exists

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: OracleVerificationFailed
errors.msg: Oracle verification failed - signature invalid or untrusted signer

errors.name: OracleDataInvalid
errors.msg: Oracle data invalid - failed to deserialize message

errors.name: OraclePriceMissing
errors.msg: Oracle price missing - no price data in payload

errors.name: OracleDataStale
errors.msg: Oracle data stale - publish time exceeds staleness threshold

errors.name: OracleConfidenceTooWide
errors.msg: Oracle confidence too wide - exceeds confidence threshold

errors.name: SessionExtractionFailed
errors.msg: Session extraction failed - invalid, expired, or unauthorized session

errors.name: InvalidEpoch
errors.msg: Invalid epoch reference

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Position already claimed

errors.name: NotImplemented
errors.msg: Instruction not yet implemented

errors.name: EpochNotOpen
errors.msg: Epoch is not in Open state

errors.name: ExceedsWalletCap
errors.msg: Exceeds per-wallet position cap

errors.name: ExceedsSideCap
errors.msg: Exceeds per-side exposure cap

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient token balance

errors.name: InvalidDirection
errors.msg: Cannot open opposite direction - hedging disabled

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: TokenOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Token account owner does not match expected user

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Token account mint does not match expected mint

errors.name: BelowMinimumTrade
errors.msg: Trade amount below minimum required

errors.name: InvalidEpochState
errors.msg: Invalid epoch state for this operation

errors.name: EpochNotEnded
errors.msg: Epoch has not reached end_time yet

errors.name: EpochNotFrozen
errors.msg: Epoch has not reached freeze_time yet

errors.name: PositionNotWinner
errors.msg: Position is not on the winning side

errors.name: InsufficientShares
errors.msg: Position does not have enough shares to sell

errors.name: ZeroShares
errors.msg: Shares amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientPoolReserves
errors.msg: Pool does not have sufficient reserves for this sell

errors.name: PoolEmpty
errors.msg: Pool has no liquidity - use admin_seed_liquidity first

errors.name: DepositTooSmall
errors.msg: Deposit too small - would mint zero LP shares

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin who updated the config

fields.name: config
docs: GlobalConfig account pubkey

fields.name: fields_updated
docs: Bitmask of which fields were updated (for efficient indexing)
Bit positions: 0=treasury, 1=insurance, 2=trading_fee, 3=lp_fee,
4=treasury_fee, 5=insurance_fee, 6=wallet_cap, 7=side_cap,
8=confidence_start, 9=confidence_settle, 10=staleness_start,
11=staleness_settle, 12=epoch_duration, 13=freeze_window,
14=allow_hedging, 15=paused, 16=frozen

types.name: EpochState
docs: Epoch state machine - tracks the lifecycle of a trading epoch

fields.name: epoch
docs: Epoch where fees were collected

fields.name: user
docs: User who paid the fees (trader)

fields.name: gross_amount
docs: Original trade amount before fees

fields.name: net_amount
docs: Amount after fees (used for share calculation)

fields.name: total_fee
docs: Total fee charged (trading_fee_bps of gross amount)

fields.name: lp_fee
docs: LP portion of fee (stays in pool USDC, auto-compounds)

fields.name: treasury_fee
docs: Treasury portion of fee (transferred to treasury)

fields.name: insurance_fee
docs: Insurance portion of fee (transferred to insurance)

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin authority - can update config, pause/freeze

fields.name: treasury
docs: Treasury account for fee collection (20% of fees)

fields.name: insurance
docs: Insurance buffer account (10% of fees)

fields.name: trading_fee_bps
docs: Trading fee in basis points (e.g., 180 = 1.8%)

fields.name: lp_fee_share_bps
docs: LP share of trading fees in basis points (e.g., 7000 = 70%)

fields.name: treasury_fee_share_bps
docs: Treasury share of trading fees in basis points (e.g., 2000 = 20%)

fields.name: insurance_fee_share_bps
docs: Insurance share of trading fees in basis points (e.g., 1000 = 10%)

fields.name: per_wallet_cap_bps
docs: Maximum position per wallet in basis points of pool (e.g., 500 = 5%)

fields.name: per_side_cap_bps
docs: Maximum exposure per side in basis points of pool (e.g., 3000 = 30%)

fields.name: oracle_confidence_threshold_start_bps
docs: Max confidence ratio for epoch start in basis points (e.g., 25 = 0.25%)

fields.name: oracle_confidence_threshold_settle_bps
docs: Max confidence ratio for settlement in basis points (e.g., 80 = 0.8%)

fields.name: oracle_staleness_threshold_start
docs: Max oracle age in seconds for epoch start (e.g., 3)

fields.name: oracle_staleness_threshold_settle
docs: Max oracle age in seconds for settlement (e.g., 10)

fields.name: epoch_duration_seconds
docs: Epoch duration in seconds (e.g., 300 = 5 minutes)

fields.name: freeze_window_seconds
docs: Freeze window before settlement in seconds (e.g., 15)

fields.name: allow_hedging
docs: If true, users can hold both UP and DOWN positions in same epoch

fields.name: paused
docs: Pause new epoch creation globally

fields.name: frozen
docs: Emergency freeze - halts ALL activity
